issues.detail: Skill lacks explicit error handling or edge case coverage, focusing mainly on happy path scenarios.

scenarios.name: static-site-with-proxy-and-rate-limit
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response A omits the required rate_limit zone and Content-Security-Policy header.

scenarios.name: wildcard-subdomain-with-dns-challenge-and-health-checks
scenarios.rationale: Both responses lack the required JSON configuration and POST example, but Response B includes more of the specified directives (round-robin, active health checks, DNS TLS) and is therefore closer to the rubric.
